backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing three UI-improvement features with related files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-written summaries of all major frontend landing-page components, hooks, assets, and global styles.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme variables and base styles for light/dark modes, including shared border and background utilities.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML document loading the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Simple wrapper that renders the TbnLandingPage.
frontend/src/components/landing/AppSecti: Renders the App section headline and a MediaFrame showing the dashboard image.
frontend/src/components/landing/assets.t: Exports an array of image paths used as carousel assets.
frontend/src/components/landing/ClosingS: Displays the closing message with headline, subheadline, and description text.
frontend/src/components/landing/FaqSecti: Renders FAQ items using shadcn Accordion components with themed styling.
frontend/src/components/landing/FooterNa: Footer containing logo, quick links, attribution, and copyright text with smooth-scroll navigation.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeaderNa: Sticky responsive header with logo, desktop links, and a mobile sheet menu using smooth scrolling.
frontend/src/components/landing/HeroSect: Hero banner with large TBN logo, problem/solution text, supporting lines, and gradient headline.
frontend/src/components/landing/MediaFra: Reusable framed image component with aspect-ratio container, loading spinner, and fade-in behavior.
frontend/src/components/landing/SwipeCar: Implements an auto-advancing, draggable/touch-enabled carousel that displays slides with media and text using tbnCopy and carouselAssets.
Renders a responsive logo image with size presets and optional custom classes.
frontend/src/components/landing/TrustedB: Displays a testimonials section using tbnCopy text and a grid of value statements.
frontend/src/components/landing/WhoForSe: Shows a checklist of target users and supporting statements pulled from tbnCopy.
frontend/src/content/tbnCopy.ts: Contains all static marketing copy for the landing page, including hero text, carousel slides, and section content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoAdvanceCarouse: Provides auto-advance, pause, resume, and navigation logic for carousels.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, login, logout, and context provisioning.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file exporting nothing for now.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles, theme variables, and custom component styles for the app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, providing React Query and Internet Identity context before rendering App.
frontend/src/pages/TbnLandingPage.tsx: Defines the landing page layout, assembling all marketing sections with header and footer.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind theme, colors, animations, and plugins for styling the frontend.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s build state, requirements, image mapping, issues, and architectural notes for the TBN landing site.
